name: Fresh Tuna & Red Potato Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Yellow Fin Tuna or other
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1-inch water (salted if desired) to a boil in a 2-quart saucepan.
2. Add the potatoes and cover the pot. Heat until boiling, then reduce the heat and simmer for 30 to 35 minutes or until tender. Drain and cool slightly.
3. Cut the potatoes into cubes (about 3 cups).
4. In a large bowl, mix together all ingredients except the potatoes.
5. Stir in the cubed potatoes and cover the bowl with plastic wrap.
6. Refrigerate for about 1 hour or until well chilled.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
Calories: 185
Protein: 20 Grams
Carbohydrates: 20 Grams
Fat: 3 Grams
Cholesterol: 45 Milligrams
Sodium: 270 Milligrams
Potassium: 880 Milligrams
